Using Origin of Time lets you either use Developmental Reset, Enlightenment Reset, or Genesis Return.

Developmental Reset resets all materials invested into them. Enlightenment gives you all enlightenments but lets you keep e0. Doing either lets you do both, but not Genesis Return
